audioPatterns: traditional music during pelamin, silent/reverent during akad, upbeats for reception

akad_nikah.classificationCues: akad nikah — closeup for reactions, wide for venue/scene, medium for akad — Sacred solemnization ceremony. Focus on groom, wali/tok kadi, and family reactions. Typically uses slow pacing, multiple camera angles.

bride_prep.classificationCues: bride prep — closeup for reactions, wide for venue/scene, medium for akad — Groom wearing Baju Melayu with samping and tanjak (headgear). Family members help with dressing. Usually shot in bedroom or family home.
